---
format: html 
---
<style>
h4 a {
  display: none !important;
}
</style>

# Publications

#### Cost-Aware Optimized Front-Door Experimental Design 
**Leopold Mareis**, Mathias Drton. *Accepted at CLeaR 2026* \
[paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22024), [presentation](content/2026_Cost_aware_exerimental_design_presentation.pdf), [poster](content/2026_Cost_aware_exerimental_design_poster.pdf), [code](https://github.com/lmareis/Cost-Aware-Optimized-Front-Door-Experimental-Design), [notebook](https://st-mardi.quarto.pub/gmci/chapters/notebook_gallery/notebooks/Cost-Aware-Experimental-Design/notebook.html)


#### MaRDI’s Zenodo Community for Graphical Modeling and Causal Inference 
**Leopold Mareis**, Stephan Haug, Mathias Drton \
[paper](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.16736173), [poster](content/2025_CoRDI_poster.pdf), [website](https://st-mardi.quarto.pub/gmci/)


#### Low-gradient magnetic separation in Biotechnology: Parameter identification and model-guided scale up 
Jan-Angelus Meyer, Jennifer Pierick, **Leopold Mareis**, Dorian Röhring, Nathalie Opilo, Georg Garnweitner, Rainer Krull \
[paper](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1383586625034331)

#### Optimizing Experimental Design for Causal Effect Estimation with Partial Measurements
**Leopold Mareis** \
[paper](https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-981-97-7812-6_7), [presentation](content/2024_PCIC_presentation.pdf), [poster](content/2024_Bernoulli_Bochum_Poster.pdf)

#### Development and certification of clinical AI software
Narges Ahmidi, **Leopold Mareis** \
[article](https://publica.fraunhofer.de/entities/publication/5002c770-388b-4fca-adfb-37f5b388bdfb)

# Preprints

#### Partially Specified Causal Simulations
Alireza Zamanian, **Leopold Mareis**, Narges Ahmidi \
[paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.10514), [Python package](https://fraunhoferiks.github.io/parcs/)
